caption: A small gathering of people is seated in a room with vertical wooden paneling and blinds in the background. A man stands at the front, wearing a white shirt under a dark vest and glasses. He appears to be speaking or performing, with a microphone positioned in front of him. The audience consists of several people viewed from behind, including individuals wearing a maroon hoodie, a yellow jacket, and various sweaters. In some frames, another man is visible standing further to the left. The camera angle shifts from a wide shot of the audience and the speaker to closer views of the man in the vest. The text "ORCA" appears as a white logo in the bottom right of each frame. As the sequence progresses, the focus tightens on the man in the vest, who is seen adjusting his position and looking down.
